de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava

Class ProofJavaParser.PrimaryPrefixReturnValue

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava.ProofJavaParser.PrimaryPrefixReturnValue
  • Enclosing class:
    ProofJavaParser

    static class ProofJavaParser.PrimaryPrefixReturnValue
extends Object
    inner class that is only used to return results from primary prefix syntax rule
    Author:
    RN
